title: The Early Tidal Reversal
description: Tucked inside Glover's coat is a hand-copied tide table for the East River, annotated in pencil by one of his senior oarsmen. The reversal time has been corrected from 2:30 AM to 1:45 AM—forty-five minutes earlier than the schedule Washington was given at the start of the operation. If the crossing rate is not accelerated before 1:45, the returning bateaux will be fighting a full ebb current directly toward the British harbor anchorage, adding forty minutes or more to every round trip and collapsing the transit schedule.
